'''forsash''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:force|force]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:force|force]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:færisith|færisith]] || [[word:færisij|færisij]] || [[word:færisish|færisish]] || [[word:færisi|færisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:farurusuth|farurusuth]] || [[word:farurusuj|farurusuj]] || [[word:farurusush|farurusush]] || [[word:farurusu|farurusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:farusuth|farusuth]] || [[word:farusuj|farusuj]] || [[word:farusush|farusush]] || [[word:farusu|farusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:farufsuth|farufsuth]] || [[word:farufsuj|farufsuj]] || [[word:farufsush|farufsush]] || [[word:farufsuf|farufsuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:færeseth|færeseth]] || [[word:færesej|færesej]] || [[word:færesesh|færesesh]] || [[word:færese|færese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:farorosoth|farorosoth]] || [[word:farorosoj|farorosoj]] || [[word:farorososh|farorososh]] || [[word:faroroso|faroroso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:farosoth|farosoth]] || [[word:farosoj|farosoj]] || [[word:farososh|farososh]] || [[word:faroso|faroso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:farofsoth|farofsoth]] || [[word:farofsoj|farofsoj]] || [[word:farofsosh|farofsosh]] || [[word:farofsof|farofsof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:farïfsïfth|farïfsïfth]] || [[word:farïfsïfj|farïfsïfj]] || [[word:farïfsïfsh|farïfsïfsh]] || [[word:farïfsïf|farïfsïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:farïfrïfsïfth|farïfrïfsïfth]] || [[word:farïfrïfsïfj|farïfrïfsïfj]] || [[word:farïfrïfsïfsh|farïfrïfsïfsh]] || [[word:farïfrïfsïf|farïfrïfsïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:færæsæth|færæsæth]] || [[word:færæsæj|færæsæj]] || [[word:færæsæsh|færæsæsh]] || [[word:færæsæ|færæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fararasath|fararasath]] || [[word:fararasaj|fararasaj]] || [[word:fararasash|fararasash]] || [[word:fararasa|fararasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:farasath|farasath]] || [[word:farasaj|farasaj]] || [[word:farasash|farasash]] || [[word:farasa|farasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:farafsath|farafsath]] || [[word:farafsaj|farafsaj]] || [[word:farafsash|farafsash]] || [[word:farafsaf|farafsaf]]
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:farasatha|farasatha]] || [[word:farasaja|farasaja]] || [[word:farasasha|farasasha]] || [[word:farasaka|farasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:farasath|farasath]] || [[word:farasaj|farasaj]] || [[word:farasash|farasash]] || [[word:farasa|farasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:farasathal|farasathal]] || [[word:farasajal|farasajal]] || [[word:farasashal|farasashal]] || [[word:farasakal|farasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:farasathatha|farasathatha]] || [[word:farasajaja|farasajaja]] || [[word:farasashasha|farasashasha]] || [[word:farasaka|farasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:farasathan|farasathan]] || [[word:farasajan|farasajan]] || [[word:farasashan|farasashan]] || [[word:farasakan|farasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:farasathaoro|farasathaoro]] || [[word:farasajaoro|farasajaoro]] || [[word:farasashaoro|farasashaoro]] || [[word:farasakaoro|farasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
